evals.prompt: I'm making a video about using Claude Code to build a full SaaS app from scratch in one sitting
evals.expected_output: 10-15 YouTube title options in 3 tiers, cross-referenced with channel performance data and competitor analysis

assertions.name: channel_data_referenced
assertions.check: mentions actual Chase AI videos or stats

assertions.name: no_generic_filler
assertions.check: no Ultimate Guide / Complete Tutorial / Everything You Need
